Palantir Co-Founder Joe Lonsdale Supports Historic Antitrust Ruling Against Google, But Accuses FTC Chair Lina Khan Of Being Radical: 'She's A Bully'
data.description: Joe Lonsdale, co-founder of Palantir Technologies, criticized big tech companies for their monopolistic tendencies and called for increased accountability and regulations while expressing concerns about the current administration's regulatory approach.

Delta Bleeds Money After Tech Disaster, Pursues Legal Claims Against CrowdStrike And Microsoft
data.description: Delta Air Lines reports $380 million impact on revenue and $170 million in expenses from CrowdStrike outage, plans to sue for $500 million in damages.
